label: Low-complexity direct care
faithful_mapping: Single-controller, low-access and low-dispute setting. Measures whether central audit remains operationally proportionate under weak adversarial pressure.

label: Interorganisational shared care
faithful_mapping: Shared-care setting crossing organisational boundaries. Measures cost of independently verifiable evidence relative to central and hash-log evidence.

label: Secondary-use governance
faithful_mapping: Lower direct access but higher policy/purpose sensitivity. Emphasises provenance, policy-version binding and audit-query v2.0.0 development.

label: High-dispute/high-revocation
faithful_mapping: Stress setting for non-equivocation pressure, verifier-state retention and consent-state transitions.

label: Cryptographic-agility transition
faithful_mapping: Same governance shape as W2 with enlarged evidence-signature artefacts. Measures artefact-size/storage effects, not post-quantum signing performance.
